testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Our clients' trust is the greatest reward we receive
testimonials.t1.name: Ahmed Mohamed Al-Nour
testimonials.t1.text: The Digital Automation team completely changed how we work. The inventory management system they developed saves us hours of manual work every day.
testimonials.t2.name: Fatima Abdullah
testimonials.t2.text: The website they built for us is very professional and runs at excellent speed. A distinguished team that is responsive to all our requirements.
testimonials.t3.name: Omar Ibrahim Khalil
testimonials.t3.text: The customer service bot they developed reduced the pressure on our support team by 70%. I highly recommend them for any tech project.
testimonials.t4.name: Mariam Hassan Osman
testimonials.t4.text: Their commitment to deadlines and quality of work makes them ideal partners. They delivered the project ahead of schedule with outstanding quality.
portfolio.p1.details.description: A sophisticated web application designed to automate warehouse and inventory management processes for enterprises and commercial businesses. It offers real-time stock level monitoring and generates automated sales and inventory reports to assist in decision-making.
portfolio.p1.details.features: Real-time stock tracking,Low-stock automated alerts,Periodic sales & audit reporting
portfolio.p2.details.description: An intelligent virtual assistant that uses advanced natural language processing (NLP) models to provide immediate customer support and answer inquiries 24/7. This reduces support team load while boosting customer satisfaction.
portfolio.p2.details.features: Bilingual support (Arabic & English),Direct integrations with social channels,Instant intent analysis and accurate replies
portfolio.p3.details.description: A unified digital portal aimed at facilitating citizen access to public services. It enables completely paperless, online application submission and tracking, saving time and administrative effort.
portfolio.p3.details.features: Online application submission & tracking,Secure digital identity verification,Statistical dashboard for administrators
portfolio.p4.details.description: An all-in-one mobile application for managing shipping and delivery logistics. The app uses AI-driven route optimization to find the fastest paths for delivery agents while offering live delivery tracking to end users.
portfolio.p4.details.features: AI-powered route optimization,Live map tracking via GPS,Comprehensive dispatcher dashboard
portfolio.p5.details.description: A smart employee attendance platform utilizing facial recognition technology to prevent time theft and spoofing. It provides human resources departments with immediate and accurate payroll-ready reports.
portfolio.p5.details.features: Highly accurate 3D face recognition,Real-time attendance dashboards,Seamless payroll system integration
portfolio.p6.details.description: A modern, high-performance e-commerce platform supporting 5 languages for global and local selling. It features secure checkouts, payment gateway integration, and inventory management.
portfolio.p6.details.features: Full support for 5 different languages,Local & global payment gateway integration,Integrated order & product manager
